testcase.name: test_buyer_can_access_buyer_deal_api
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_rbac_and_detail_pages.py:71: in test_buyer_can_access_buyer_deal_api assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 401 E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_dealer_deals_invalid_id_returns_error

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 400/404, got 401 assert 401 in [400, 403, 404] + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code
